description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a brick exterior and a complex, multi-gabled roof in shades of gray. The house is surrounded by a well-maintained yard, featuring a paved walkway leading to the main entrance and several mature trees providing shade and privacy. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with a small stoop, rectangular windows with white trim, and a modest overhang above the door. The rear of the house features a large garage with double doors and additional windows, while the sides are bordered by hedges and fencing for enclosure. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, contributing to a balanced and traditional appearance. The overall setting suggests a quiet residential neighborhood, with landscaping that enhances curb appeal and privacy.
description: A two-story brick suburban house with a multi-gabled gray roof, surrounded by trees, hedges, and a fenced yard. Features include a prominent front entry, symmetrical windows, and a large rear garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, paved walkway, symmetrical windows, and dense tree coverage on both sides.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the large garage doors, fenced backyard, and additional trees and hedges along the property line.
description_view_2: Rear view with visible windows, backyard greenery, and a more private, enclosed appearance due to the trees and fencing.
description_view_3: Opposite side/rear view focusing on the garage, driveway area, and a row of hedges along the property edge.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with a small stoop, rectangular overhang, and flanked by windows; no porch or columns.
